CustomField.description: When checked, the Program Enrollment Apply Late Fee flow sets Enrollment Late Fee to $0 and skips the standard late-fee calculation. Use when a course offering start date is later than the term (e.g. a section that starts mid-term).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check when the student's course section starts on a different schedule than the term start; suppresses the standard late fee from automation.
CustomField.label: Suppress Automated Late Fee
